quality.rationale: 需串联爱因斯坦场方程、应力能张量与里奇张量计算推导宇宙学动力学方程

origin.question: Problem 19.13. By requiring that the Robertson-Walker metric satisfy the Einstein field equations, derive the dynamical equations for a perfect fluid Friedmann cosmology:$$3 \ddot {\mathbf {R}} + 4 \pi \mathbf {G} (\rho + 3 \mathrm {p}) \mathbf {R} = 0 \tag {1}$$$$\ddot {\mathbf {R}} \ddot {\mathbf {R}} + 2 \dot {\mathbf {R}}^{2} + 2 \mathbf {k} - 4 \pi \mathrm {G} (\rho - \mathrm {p}) \mathbf {R}^{2} = 0. \tag {2}$$
origin.solution: Solution 19.13. In the comoving orthonormal frame we have $\mathbf{T}_{\hat{\theta}}^{\hat{0}} = -\rho$ , and $\mathbf{T}_{\hat{\mathbf{r}}}^{\hat{\mathbf{r}}} = \mathbf{T}_{\hat{\phi}}^{\hat{\phi}} = \mathbf{T}_{\hat{\theta}}^{\hat{\theta}} = \mathbf{p}$ . The trace-reversed stress energy tensor $\overline{\mathbf{T}}$ thus has components $\overline{\mathbf{T}}_{\hat{\theta}}^{\hat{0}} = -\frac{1}{2} (\rho + 3\mathbf{p})$ , and $\overline{\mathbf{T}}_{\hat{\mathbf{t}}}^{\hat{\mathbf{i}}} = \frac{1}{2} (\rho - \mathbf{p})$ . We equate this to $1/8\pi G$ times the Ricci tensor. The Ricci tensor can be calculated e.g. from the results of Problem 9.20 (general spherically symmetric metric). The components are:$$R_{\hat {0}}^{\hat {0}} = 3 \ddot {R} / R$$$$R^{\hat {1}}_{\hat {1}} = \frac {1}{R^{2}} (R \ddot {R} + 2 \dot {R}^{2} + 2 k).$$The equations in the problem now follow immediately. If, equivalently, the Einstein tensor $\mathbf{G}_{\mu \nu}$ (trace reverse Ricci tensor) had been equated to $8\pi \mathbf{T}_{\mu \nu}$ , two linear combinations of the equations would have been obtained.
